title: Government Immigration Websites | Houston & Austin, TX | Foster LLP
content:
## We Invite You to Browse the Provided Links for Further Information
If you have questions about green cards, U.S. citizenship requirements, visa processing times, or any other aspect of immigration law, Foster LLP can help. As a leader in global immigration, our dedicated team has compiled the following links to help educate our clients on the issues that matter most to them.
Once you are ready to speak to our immigration lawyer, reach out to schedule a consultation . With principal offices located in Austin and Houston, TX, our immigration law firm has worked with individuals , families, employers , and entrepreneurs .

## Most Helpful Global Immigration Links
- USCIS Office Closures
- USCIS Processing Times
- Visa Appointment Wait Times
- CBP I-94 Arrival/Departure Record
- Form AR-11 Change of Address
